And so, you know, one of the things that Marcel started sharing last year that was quite compelling and captured a lot of attention, like folks like myself was, how can we take some of that deep knowledge that we have in building content engines, but start to build workflows that are really from a mindset of like, what are all those different jobs to be done of creating this content and breaking those down into a variety of different workflows?
You know, certainly there's a lot of people who for a while.

And then if you start to arm humans in the loop throughout, you can really build something that can compound in terms of impact down the funnel.

If you're not familiar with programmatic, that is essentially like highly templatized content that is typically going after a high volume of variants, sometimes lower volume on the individual search level, but can compound into something bigger.
You know, oftentimes that could be like going after like industry type variants or location based.
There's a whole lot of different things that you could cover into that world where editorial is more kind of longer form content oftentimes can be a blog, but not limited to that.

That wasn't enough for some of the brands we work with to have success.
That we had many that had.

We'd be those almost as add-ons, if you will.
